claims.summary: The live PI controller may stabilize lambda1 while underrepresenting lambda4-plus vibrancy.
claims.disposition: Verified the live PI inputs do not directly include tail-vibrancy weighting; preserved this as a real design concern rather than dismissing the felt report.

claims.summary: The band-stop filter is currently over-damping the tail.
claims.disposition: Not established from this report alone; routed a copied semantic-trickle versus tail-dispersal comparison with pressure and porosity held visible.

claims.summary: Pressure and porosity need to remain distinct from health or settledness.
claims.disposition: Verified read-only pressure/porosity divergence and stuckness reviews, with focused tests and no controller consumption.

claims.summary: PI should gain dynamic tail weighting or manually increased pressure.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 live regulator authority.
